viral_examples.text: Every picture of JP Morgan published in his lifetime (and thus nearly every picture published since) was heavily retouched. This is what he actually looked like.

viral_examples.text: my entire content strategy is this give you free startup ideas + growth playbooks that work i won't hold back and every time you build something from my tweets/pod I'm sippin' a martini & cheering you on your success is my ultimate flex now go ship something & make me proud
